title: Code of Conduct & Ethics
description: Core ethics, gifts & hospitality thresholds, Personal Account Dealing (PAD), and Whistleblowing.

articles.title: Gifts & Entertainment Disclosure and Pre-Approval Thresholds
articles.content:
Core Principles: Integrity, Client Interest, Market Conduct, Confidentiality, Accountability.
Gifts & Hospitality Disclosure & Approval Thresholds:
• Gift received from client/vendor: Disclosure > GBP 50 | Pre-Approval > GBP 150.
• Entertainment received (meals/events): Disclosure > GBP 100 | Pre-Approval > GBP 300.
• Gift or entertainment given to client: Disclosure > GBP 100 | Pre-Approval > GBP 500.
• Gifts to/from Public Officials: Disclosure ANY value | Pre-Approval MANDATORY for any value.
Note: Cash or cash equivalent gifts are strictly prohibited. Log all gifts in the Gifts & Hospitality Register on Policy Hub.

articles.title: Personal Account Dealing (PAD), Outside Interests & Whistleblowing
articles.content:
Personal Account Dealing (PAD):
• All personal securities trades must be pre-cleared in the PAD module.
• Minimum holding period: 30 calendar days. No trading while in possession of MNPI or on Restricted/Insider lists.
Outside Business Interests & Relationships:
• External directorships, trusteeships, or family business roles require prior approval from Manager & Compliance in Workday.
• Personal relationships with colleagues affecting reporting/appraisal lines must be declared to HR.
Speak-Up (Whistleblowing) Line:
• Report misconduct or policy breaches via Line Manager, HR, Compliance Mailbox, or the 24/7 confidential/anonymous Speak-Up Line. Retaliation is strictly prohibited.
